Acclamation Text: I am the good shepherd, says the Lord; I know my sheep, and mine know me. MONDAY 543 YEARS B AND C When the gospel of John 10.1-10 is read on the Fourth Sunday of Easter, Year A, the alternate gospel,

Refrain Text: All you nations, praise the Lord.
Acclamation Text: My sheep listen to me, says the Lord; I know them, and they follow me.

Refrain Text: O God, let all the nations praise you!
Acclamation Text: I am the light of the world, says the Lord; whoever follows me will have the light of life.

Refrain Text: For ever I will sing the goodness of the Lord.
Acclamation Text: Jesus Christ, you are the faithful witness, firstborn from the dead; you have loved us and washed away our sins in your blood. THURSDAY 551

Refrain Text: You are my Son; this day I have begotten you.
Acclamation Text: I am the way, the truth, and the life, says the Lord; no one comes to the Father, except through me. FRIDAY 553

Refrain Text: All the ends of the earth have seen the saving power of God.
Acclamation Text: If you stay in my word, you will indeed be my disciples, and you will know the truth, says the Lord.

Refrain Text: Not to us, O Lord, but to your name give the glory.
Acclamation Text: The Holy Spirit will teach you all things and remind you of all I have said to you. 558 FIFTH WEEK OF EASTER

Refrain Text: Your friends tell the glory of your kingship, Lord.
Acclamation Text: Christ had to suffer and to rise from the dead, and so enter into his glory.

Refrain Text: Let us go rejoicing to the house of the Lord.
Acclamation Text: Live in me and let me live in you, says the Lord; my branches bear much fruit.

Refrain Text: Proclaim God’s marvellous deeds to all the nations.
Acclamation Text: My sheep listen to my voice, says the Lord; I know them, and they follow me. THURSDAY 565

Refrain Text: I will praise you among the nations, O Lord.
Acclamation Text: I call you my friends, says the Lord, for I have made known to you all that the Father has told me. FRIDAY 567

Refrain Text: Let all the earth cry out to God with joy.
Acclamation Text: If then you have been raised with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is seated at the right hand of God. SATURDAY 569

Refrain Text: The Lord takes delight in his people.
Acclamation Text: The Spirit of truth will bear witness to me, says the Lord, and you also will be my witness.

Refrain Text: Your right hand has saved me, O Lord.
Acclamation Text: The Lord says: I will send you the Spirit of truth, who will lead you to the whole truth.

Refrain Text: Heaven and earth are full of your glory.
Acclamation Text: The Father will send you the Holy Spirit, says the Lord, to be with you for ever. 576 SIXTH WEEK OF EASTER

Refrain Text: The Lord has revealed to the nations his saving power.
Acclamation Text: The Lord says: I will not leave you orphans. I will come back to you, and your hearts will rejoice. 578 SIXTH WEEK OF EASTER

Refrain Text: God is king of all the earth.
Acclamation Text: Christ had to suffer and to rise from the dead, and so enter into his glory.

Refrain Text: God is king of all the earth.
Acclamation Text: I went from the Father and came into the world; and now I leave the world to return to the Father.

Refrain Text: Sing to God, O kingdoms of the earth.
Acclamation Text: If then you have been raised with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is seated at the right hand of God.

Refrain Text: Sing to God, O kingdoms of the earth.
Acclamation Text: The Father will send you the Holy Spirit, says the Lord, to be with you for ever.

Refrain Text: Sing to God, O kingdoms of the earth.
Acclamation Text: Your word, O Lord, is truth; make us holy in the truth.

Refrain Text: Keep me safe, O God; you are my hope.
Acclamation Text: May all be one as you, Father, are in me, and I in you; let the world believe that you sent me, says the Lord. 592 SEVENTH WEEK OF EASTER

Refrain Text: The Lord has set his throne in heaven.
Acclamation Text: The Holy Spirit will teach you all things and remind you of all I have said to you.

Refrain Text: The just will gaze on your face, O Lord.
Acclamation Text: The Lord says: I will send you the Spirit of truth, who will lead you to the whole truth. SATURDAY 597

Refrain Text: Keep me safe, O God; you are my hope.
Acclamation Text: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad.
